infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to provide nearby address suggestions when editing your profile.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow MyGardenOS to access your photos to set a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow MyGardenOS to use the camera to take a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Allow MyGardenOS to connect to your mower over Bluetooth for remote control and map transfer.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Allow MyGardenOS to connect to your mower over Bluetooth.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow MyGardenOS to use your location to suggest nearby addresses.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow MyGardenOS to access your photos to set a profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow MyGardenOS to use the camera to take a profile picture.
